# qualifier

**Instance Property**

An optional piece of data to distinguish entities that otherwise share the same UUID.

## Declaration

```swift
var qualifier: Data? { get set }
```

## Inspecting identifier properties

- **uuid**: A UUID to uniquely identify this entity.

items.description: A UUID to uniquely identify this entity.
